appliedScreens: Execution Approval / Approval Record Write UX surfaces inside Work Surface

checks.captureLimitation: re-captured through fallback Playwright default viewport after in-app browser timeout

codexLevelUxFit: Work Surface now has a clearer primary work area, calmer status language, and inline review/preview rhythm.

Details remain inspectable without requiring script or external activation.
claudeCodeLevelAuthorityUxFit: Permission and execution boundaries are visible before any invocation.

remainingPerceivedProductQualityRisk: Control Center still exposes some technical sidebar/inspector strings and should get a second language-polish pass.

nextSafeAction: Move to the next planned product slice only after preserving this visual system as the baseline; do not open write, invocation, connector, model, external-send, or durable-memory boundaries.
